name: merkle audit log: verify-chain mode detects a modified line (next line's prev_hash no longer matches the canonical hash of the tampered line)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event a --actor t --data {} && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event b --actor t --data {} && node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const ls=fs.readFileSync(".claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl","utf8").trim().split("
");const j=JSON.parse(ls[0]);j.event="tampered";ls[0]=JSON.stringify(j);fs.writeFileSync(".claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl",ls.join("
")+"
")' && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --verify-chain
